patches.hypothesis: The original patch only addressed null headers but did not handle other edge cases such as repeated null values or mixed null and non-null values. The refined patch will add comprehensive null checks and handle all edge cases related to header values, ensuring robustness.
patches.original_hypothesis: The NullPointerException occurs because one of the headers in the headerRecord array is null. This can happen if the input CSV has missing values in the header row. We need to add a null check before calling trim() on each header.

patches.hypothesis: The refined fix addresses overfitting by adding comprehensive null checks and handling various edge cases such as null values at different positions, repeated null values, and mixed null and empty strings in the header.
patches.original_hypothesis: The NullPointerException occurs because one of the headers in the headerRecord array is null. This can happen if the CSV input has missing values in the header row. The fix involves checking for null values before calling trim() on each header.
